commit.message:
Fix audio disappearing after ~1s: cancel delayed keepAlive stop before starting new session

stopSynth/stopSession/stopCustomProgram each schedule a delayed audioEl.pause()
via scheduleStopKeepAlive(). When starting a new session, the early
cancelStopKeepAlive() was negated by these cleanup calls re-scheduling the
pause. Added cancelStopKeepAlive() right before startKeepAlive() in all three
start functions to ensure the delayed pause is cancelled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(main,mux_client): extract workflow_run_policy_input helper and gate test-only dead code

main.rs: Two identical 7-line blocks constructing a PolicyInput for
WorkflowRun authorization were duplicated in the run() function (one for
named workflows, one for workflow_name path). Extracted into a shared
workflow_run_policy_input(pane_id, workflow_name) helper with a unit test
verifying the contract (ActionKind::WorkflowRun, ActorKind::Human,
PolicySurface::Workflow, correct pane and workflow ID propagation).

mux_client.rs: The mpsc_reserve_send import and pane_delta_send function
were only used in test code but compiled unconditionally, generating dead
code warnings in release builds. Added #[cfg(test)] gates to both the
import and the function definition.

Cargo.toml (frankenterm-gui): Added benchmarking 0.4.13 and k9 as
dev-dependencies for upcoming GUI benchmark and snapshot testing.

client.rs: Fixed indentation alignment on a closing parenthesis/bracket
chain (pure whitespace, no logic change).

commit.message:
Encrypt OAuth tokens at rest with per-org AES-256-GCM keys

- New src/crypto.js: AES-256-GCM encryption with keys derived from
  HMAC-SHA256(SESSION_SECRET, orgId) — each org gets a unique key
- All 5 OAuth refresh tokens (Drive, OneDrive, Box, Gmail, Outlook)
  encrypted before storage and decrypted on use
- Automatic migration: existing plaintext tokens encrypted on startup
- Backward compatible: gracefully handles missing SESSION_SECRET
- Updated architecture review response: token encryption implemented,
  self-hosting/single-tenant option documented
- Updated security spec to v1.2 with encryption details

commit.message:
fix: Handle empty mapStyle to prevent MapLibre crash (#351)

* fix: Handle empty mapStyle in MapLibreBasemapOp to prevent crash

When a user clears the mapStyle URL in MapLibreBasemapOp, the app previously
crashed with "There is no style added to the map" because timeline-editor
attempted to call isStyleLoaded() on a MapLibre instance with no style. Now,
an empty mapStyle signals "no basemap" (transparent background) and is handled
gracefully by skipping MapLibre rendering entirely, allowing DeckGL layers to
render over a transparent background.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(line+booking): webhook ADMIN_TOKEN CF binding, treatment consent UI, destination-to-tenant hardening

Root causes diagnosed and fixed:

=== A: LINE無反応（non-default tenant） ===
Root cause: getTenantLineConfig() in webhook/route.ts read ADMIN_TOKEN
  only from process.env. On Cloudflare Pages, secrets are stored as
  bindings accessible via getRequestContext().env — NOT process.env.
  → Workers returned 401 for GET /admin/settings
  → fell back to env var credentials (default bot's channelSecret)
  → signature verification failed for non-default bot
  → replyLine silently returned 401, user got no reply

  Fix (webhook/route.ts):
  - getTenantLineConfig: check getRequestContext().env.ADMIN_TOKEN first,
    then fall back to process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN
  - Add POST debug=1 mode returning tenant resolution trace:
    { resolvedTenantId, resolvedBy, kvHit, cfgSource, cfgHasSecret,
      cfgHasToken, sigVerified, hint }
  - Track resolvedBy: query_param | destination_kv | destination_miss |
    no_api_base | env_default | hardcoded_default

  Fix (index.ts — Workers):
  - PUT /admin/settings: auto-register line:destination-to-tenant:{botUserId}
    via waitUntil (fire-and-forget) whenever LINE credentials are present.
    Handles both line-setup page (PUT) and Settings page (POST .../save).
  - POST .../save: remove TTL from destination-to-tenant KV (was 90 days
    → permanent). Sudden expiry was an ops incident risk.
  - GET /line/destination-to-tenant: gate with ALLOW_PUBLIC_LINE_LOOKUP=1
    env var (default: hidden / 404). Set this env var in CF Workers env
    to enable the endpoint for webhook destination lookup.

  Fix (line-setup/page.tsx):
  - After saveAdminSettings succeeds, also POST to /messaging/save endpoint
    (best-effort, doesn't fail the save). This triggers /v2/bot/info fetch
    and writes the KV key immediately when credentials are first saved.

=== B: 施術同意文が表示されない ===
Root cause: settings.eyebrow.consentText (treatment consent = long text)
  and settings.consentText (booking agreement checkbox) are separate fields.
  Treatment consent was never rendered as a UI block; it was silently
  dropped when the generic consentText was non-empty.

  Fix (BookingFlow.tsx):
  - Extract treatmentConsentText = raw.eyebrow?.consentText ||
    raw.verticalConfig?.consentText as separate state
  - Pass to StepConfirm as treatmentConsentText prop

  Fix (StepConfirm.tsx):
  - Add treatmentConsentText? prop
  - Render amber-bordered scrollable block (max-h-40, whitespace-pre-wrap)
    BEFORE the agree checkbox, only when non-empty
  - Checkbox label unchanged (uses generic consentText)

=== C: 運用事故防止 ===
- destination-to-tenant TTL removed (permanent KV)
- GET /line/destination-to-tenant gated behind ALLOW_PUBLIC_LINE_LOOKUP=1
  (ops: set this env var in CF Workers production environment to re-enable)

chore: sync grammar with vor-stream and add missing keyword support (#13)

## Summary

- **Remove `antlr4ts`** — unused alpha dependency (unmaintained since
~2017); all code already uses the `antlr4` runtime. `_js_parser` files
confirmed at same grammar version (ANTLR 4.12.0).
- **Add missing completions** — `label`, `exceptq`, `scenario`,
`unittest`, `modelname` were in the `vor-stream` grammar but not
surfaced in auto-complete
- **Add `model` snippet** — mirrors the existing `node` snippet for
standalone model node declarations
- **Update `tmLanguage.json`** — `MODEL` added to `keyword.control`;
`DB`, `EXCEPTQ`, `SCENARIO`, `UNITTEST`, `MODELNAME` added to
`keyword.other` so they are syntax-highlighted
- **Add `testdata/sample.strm`** — comprehensive syntax reference file
covering all supported keywords; replaces `examples/firstprocess.strm`

## Files Changed

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `package.json` | Remove `antlr4ts` dependency |
| `package-lock.json` | Updated lockfile |
| `src/extension.ts` | Add 5 new completions + `model` snippet |
| `syntaxes/strm.tmLanguage.json` | Add `MODEL` to control keywords, 5
keywords to other |
| `testdata/sample.strm` | New comprehensive syntax reference file |
| `examples/firstprocess.strm` | Removed (superseded by
`testdata/sample.strm`) |

## Test Plan

### Build and package

```bash
npm install
npm run package
npx @vscode/vsce package
# Produces vor-stream-0.1.0.vsix
```

### Install in VS Code

```
Ctrl+Shift+P → "Extensions: Install from VSIX..."
Select vor-stream-0.1.0.vsix → Reload when prompted
```

### Open testdata/sample.strm and verify newly added keywords

- [ ] `model`, `label`, `db`, `exceptq`, `scenario`, `unittest`,
`modelname` are syntax-highlighted
- [ ] Trigger auto-complete (`Ctrl+Space`) — `label`, `model`,
`exceptq`, `scenario`, `unittest`, `modelname` appear in the suggestion
list
- [ ] `antlr4ts` no longer appears in `node_modules/` after `npm
install`

### Known issues (tracked in separate PRs, not in scope here)

- Auto-complete list includes quoted strings from the document — to be
fixed in `fix/p1-bugs` or context-aware completions PR
- `model` snippet does not insert on tab after typing — under
investigation, to be fixed in context-aware completions PR

### CI checks (automated)

- [X] Prettier passes

---------

commit.message:
feat: make auto-recipe extraction fork-aware across all workflows (#4)

Before submitting a new recipe, workflows now discover similar existing
recipes first. If a close match is found (score > 0.7), the recipe is
submitted as a fork with forked_from to inherit grade, avoiding registry
clutter from near-duplicates.

Updated 14 short auto-recipe blocks, w-compound detailed block, and
w-background-compound Phase 1.5. Added 16 fork-awareness tests.

166/166 tests passing.

commit.message:
Fix visual duplication: keep Dashboard permanently in DOM with CSS display (#118)

Root cause: {page==='dashboard' && (...)} conditional rendering causes the
entire page-inner tree to unmount/remount when navigating between pages.
Rapid clicking between pages creates mount/unmount race conditions that cause
visible section duplication and layout corruption.

Fix: Replace conditional rendering with CSS display:none toggle for the
dashboard wrapper div. The dashboard content is mounted ONCE on first load
and stays in the DOM permanently — navigating away just hides it. Navigating
back instantly shows it (no re-mount, no re-fetch, no fresh state).

Also adds:
- mountedRef guard on loadAll() to prevent stale setState calls if component
  unmounts while data is being fetched
- Explicit unmount cleanup effect

Co-authored-by: Derik J Bannister <derikbannister9@Deriks-MacBook-Pro.local>

commit.message:
Initial commit: NeuralSpell 30M parameter spell corrector training pipeline

Complete training pipeline for a BERT-style encoder-only spell corrector:
- Model: 32.1M params, 6 layers, 512 hidden, RoPE, SwiGLU, RMSNorm
- Data: DFSG-compliant corpus pipeline (Wikipedia, Gutenberg, StackExchange)
- Corruption engine: 11 error types (keyboard, phonetic, homophone, grammar, etc.)
- Two-phase training: MLM pretraining + correction fine-tuning
- Training dashboard with CSV logging and TensorBoard support
- SentencePiece BPE tokenizer (32K vocab)
